dailyOutages.plant: About 345 MW interruption occurred under Bagerhat, Mongla, Satkhira, Goalpara, Khulna (C), Noapara & Benapole S/S up to 8:42 hrs as 132 kv buses at Khulna (S) got
dailyOutages.reason: About 345 MW interruption occurred under Bagerhat, Mongla, Satkhira, Goalpara, Khulna (C), Noapara & Benapole S/S up to 8:42 hrs as 132 kv buses at Khulna (S) got tripped operating bus bar protection trip. Khulna (S) 132 kv buses were switched on at 10:00 hr & Satkhira S/S got power.
dailyOutages.full_desc: About 345 MW interruption occurred under Bagerhat, Mongla, Satkhira, Goalpara, Khulna (C), Noapara & Benapole S/S up to 8:42 hrs as 132 kv buses at Khulna (S) got tripped operating bus bar protection trip. Khulna (S) 132 kv buses were switched on at 10:00 hr & Satkhira S/S got power.
